_README: EV layout + masses for the CAR design viewer. Positions in METRES, +X = front. mass_kg drives the live CG / front-rear balance. glider = stripped car (kept parts). motors[] feed the Motor selector — choosing one updates the motor box (size/mass), the balance, and shows how much torque the transaxle actually takes (capped at transaxle_torque_limit_nm, ADR-0004). The driveline (motor → adapter → torque tube → transaxle) is drawn so you can see the interaction.
_motors_note: Real specs: HyPer9 (NetGain vendor sheet) ø8.66in×13.98in, 130lb, 95kW/235Nm@8000. Leaf EM57 cross-section ~320×317mm (conversion sources), 110kW/320Nm@10500 (e+ 160kW/340Nm). Axial length + bare-motor mass are best estimates — VERIFY on the actual unit / vendor drawing. size=[axialLen, dia, dia] in metres.
